title: Cyclostemon zeylanicus
intro: Cyclostemon zeylanicus, also known as Indian Staff Tree or Ceylon Staff Tree, is a tree species native to Sri Lanka, belonging to the family Melastomataceae. This plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, inflammation, and digestive issues, due to its potential anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The bioactive constituents of Cyclostemon zeylanicus include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are believed to contribute to its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with this plant are decoctions, infusions, and ointments, used to treat fever, skin infections, and digestive problems.
